$comment: EliOS roster - qi fills the 8 email placeholders, then runs seed-roster.sql. Roles per the EliOS ROLE MODEL (qi 2026-06-12): MASTERS see ALL leads, assign leads, manage roster; SUBSCRIBERS see ONLY leads assigned to them (RLS-scoped). Emails MUST match the address each user logs in with (Supabase Auth invite address OR Google OAuth email - they must be identical).

model.master: Admin tier. Sees ALL leads + ALL grants. Can assign/unassign leads to any subscriber. Can manage the roster (set roles).
model.subscriber: Sees ONLY the leads assigned to them (RLS-scoped via lead_grants/my_leads). No roster or cross-buyer visibility.
